sample_edits.old: # Get git diff context if available DIFF_STAT="" if command -v git &>/dev/null && git re
sample_edits.new: # Get git diff context if available DIFF_STAT="" if command -v git &>/dev/null && git re

sample_edits.old: FILE_EXTENSION="${FILE_PATH##*.}" [[ "$FILE_EXTENSION" == "$FILE_BASENAME" ]] && FILE_EXTENSION="non
sample_edits.new: FILE_EXTENSION="${FILE_BASENAME##*.}" [[ "$FILE_EXTENSION" == "$FILE_BASENAME" ]] && FILE_EXTENSION=

sample_edits.old: if [[ -f "$CORRECTION_FILE" ]]; then CORRECTIONS_FOUND=$(jq -r '.total_corrections // 0'
sample_edits.new: if [[ -f "$CORRECTION_FILE" ]]; then CORRECTIONS_FOUND=$(jq -r '.total_corrections // 0'

sample_edits.old: corrections_detected: $CORRECTION_RATE checklist:
sample_edits.new: corrections_detected: $CORRECTION_RATE correction_file_types: $CORRECTION_FILE_TYPES correctio

sample_edits.old: echo "║ ✓ ABSTRACT: $PATTERNS_FOUND patterns, $SCRIPT_IDEAS scripts ║"
sample_edits.new: echo "║ ✓ ABSTRACT: $PATTERNS_FOUND patterns, $SCRIPT_IDEAS scripts ║"
